titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Sid Caesar Papers
titlestmt.author: by Caderyn Owen Jones, Leigh Golden, and Michael Rush

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday October 21, 2020 at 03:25

did.unittitle: Sid Caesar papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.
Boxes 24-27 (audiovisual materials): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Sid Caesar Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Sid Caesar Papers. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection or revisions in arrangement and description.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two groupings: January 2018 acquisition; and March 2020 acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The bulk of this collection consists of Sid Caesar's copies of scripts from his many television programs and appearances, including Your Show of Shows, Caesar's Hour, Sid Caesar Invites You, The Sid Caesar Show, and others. It also includes related correspondence, screenplays, subject files, and reference materials, as well as recordings of Your Show of Shows and other programs related to Caesar.

bioghist.head: Sid Caesar
bioghist.p: Sid Caesar (1922-2014), American comic actor and writer.

did.unittitle: January 2018 acquisition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This acquisition consists of Sid Caesar's copies of scripts from his many television programs and appearances, including Your Show of Shows, Caesar's Hour, Sid Caesar Invites You, The Sid Caesar Show, and others. It also includes related correspondence, screenplays, subject files, and reference materials.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged by program title in rough chronological order.

did.unittitle: Your Show of Shows, scripts 1 through 36

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scripts 2, 3, 6, 11, 14, 15, and 22 through 28 are not present.

did.unittitle: Your Show of Shows, scripts 43 through 78

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Script 46 is not present.

did.unittitle: Your Show of Shows, scripts 79 through 128

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scripts 85 through 91, 104, 111, 114, 115, 119, and 127 are not present.

did.unittitle: Your Show of Shows, scripts 133 through 160

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scripts 135 through 139, 141, 142, 144, 148, 150, 151, 153, and 158 are not present.

did.unittitle: Your Show of Shows correspondence and other papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains correspondence, episode lists, props, and other papers relating to Your Show of Shows.

did.unittitle: Caesar's Hour, scripts 9 through 70

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scripts 11, 13, 15, 17, 19 through 32, 35, 39 through 42, 47, 50, 51, 55, 60, and 62 are not present.

did.unittitle: Caesar's Hour, scripts 72 through 88

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Scripts 78 and 82 through 85 are not present.

did.unittitle: Caesar's Hour correspondence and other papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains correspondence and other papers, including a cast list, related to Caesar's Hour.

did.unittitle: Sid Caesar Invites You, scripts 1 through 8
Sid Caesar Invites You, scripts 9 through 18
As Caesar Sees It, scripts 1 through 9

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also includes related correspondence.

did.unittitle: Sid Caesar Show, scripts 1 through 13
Sid Caesar Show, scripts and other papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains unnumbered scripts for the Sid Caesar Show, correspondence, running orders, and other papers.

did.unittitle: Sid Caesar Show, scripts and other papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains unnumbered scripts for the Sid Caesar Show, correspondence, running orders, and other papers.

did.unittitle: Caesar Presents, scripts 1 through 6
Caesar Presents, scripts 6 through 9
Caesar's On, script 6

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains forty-seven duplicate scripts for Caesar's On, 6: "The Anniversary Present."

did.unittitle: Caesar's On, script 11

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains thirty-seven duplicate scripts for Caesar's On, 11: "Maggi's Birthday Party."

did.unittitle: Scripts for special and appearances

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box includes scripts for television episodes and specials featuring Sid Caesar, including The Ed Sullivan Show, The Andy Williams Show, The Dean Martin Show, and Las Vegas Performances.

did.unittitle: The Diplomat, scripts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains twenty-seven scripts for "The Diplomat" and related correspondence.

did.unittitle: Screenplays

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box includes screenplays for "It's A Living" and "So These Are Our Times...?" and several untitled screenplays.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous scripts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains various scripts for shows and sketches, most of them unnamed. Includes scripts for the sketches "The Underground Gourmet" and "The Wily Wilby."

did.unittitle: Files and reference material

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This box contains various files and reference material, including Sid Caesar's biography, information on animals and animation, and episode lists for Caesar's Hour and Your Show of Shows.

did.unittitle: March 2020 acquisition

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This acquisition consists of recordings of Your Show of Shows and other programs related to Sid Caesar.

did.unittitle: The Best of Your Show of Shows, #559 "Late TV Movies", Ziv International, 1" Edited Master

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
